subcodes.first_line: A just sovereign is as the head to the body of the world. God, exalted be His glory, shall adorn this most exalted station which in truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ملک عادل بمثابه سراست از برای جسد عالم انشاءالله حق تعالی شائنه این مقام اعلی را که فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @status of kings; future of monarchy
